requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——2016年英国电磁兼容法规（SI 2016/1091）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——2016年英國電磁相容法規（SI 2016/1091）

summary.en: The Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091) is the GB-retained successor to EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. Air-source heat pumps, as electrical apparatus containing motors and power electronics, must meet the essential EMC requirements for emissions and immunity. The EN 55014 and EN 61000 series are voluntary harmonised/designated standards that may be used to demonstrate presumption of conformity; the mandatory legal duty is compliance with SI 2016/1091, not use of the named EN standards. A UK Declaration of Conformity or accepted equivalent must cite the applicable legislation and the standards or other technical specifications used.
summary.zh: 《2016年电磁兼容法规》（SI 2016/1091）是英国留存的法规，为欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU的继承法规。空气源热泵作为含电机和功率电子器件的电气设备，须满足关于发射和抗扰度的基本电磁兼容要求。EN 55014和EN 61000系列是自愿采用的协调/指定标准，可用于证明符合性推定；强制性法律义务是符合SI 2016/1091，而非使用这些具名EN标准。英国符合性声明或被接受的等效声明须引用适用法规以及所使用的标准或其他技术规范。
summary.zht: 《2016年電磁相容法規》（SI 2016/1091）是英國留存的法規，為歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU的繼承法規。空氣源熱泵作為含電機和功率電子器件的電氣設備，須滿足關於發射和抗擾度的基本電磁相容要求。EN 55014和EN 61000系列是自願採用的協調/指定標準，可用於證明符合性推定；強制性法律義務是符合SI 2016/1091，而非使用這些具名EN標準。英國符合性聲明或被接受的等效聲明須引用適用法規以及所使用的標準或其他技術規範。

standards_or_laws: EN 55014-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
EN 55014-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 2: Immunity
EN 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
EN 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances including heat pumps are primarily covered under GB 4343.1 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics for household appliances, electric tools, and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) and GB/T 4343.2 (immunity), which are technically based on the CISPR 14 series. For heat pumps and air conditioning equipment, GB/T 17626 series (IEC 61000-4 based) applies for immunity testing. EMC compliance is part of the CCC certification process. Chinese EMC test reports to GB 4343.1/4343.2 are not accepted as equivalent to EN 55014-1/55014-2 testing for UK EMC Regulations compliance, as the test conditions, limits, and certification pathways differ.
summary.zh: 中国针对包括热泵在内的家用电器的电磁兼容要求主要涵盖在GB 4343.1（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁干扰特性——第1部分：发射）和GB/T 4343.2（抗扰度）中，技术上基于CISPR 14系列。对于热泵和空调设备，GB/T 17626系列（基于IEC 61000-4）适用于抗扰度测试。电磁兼容合规是CCC认证流程的一部分。中国按GB 4343.1/4343.2出具的电磁兼容测试报告不被接受为等同于EN 55014-1/55014-2测试，以满足英国电磁兼容法规要求，因为测试条件、限值和认证路径存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國針對包括熱泵在內的家用電器的電磁相容要求主要涵蓋在GB 4343.1（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁干擾特性——第1部分：發射）和GB/T 4343.2（抗擾度）中，技術上基於CISPR 14系列。對於熱泵和空調設備，GB/T 17626系列（基於IEC 61000-4）適用於抗擾度測試。電磁相容合規是CCC認證流程的一部分。中國按GB 4343.1/4343.2出具的電磁相容測試報告不被接受為等同於EN 55014-1/55014-2測試，以滿足英國電磁相容法規要求，因為測試條件、限值和認證路徑存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — household appliances, electric tools — Emission (SAMR/SAC; based on CISPR 14-1)
GB/T 4343.2 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — household appliances, electric tools — Immunity (SAC; based on CISPR 14-2)
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques (SAC; based on IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build EMC evidence acceptable for SI 2016/1091. EN 55014-1, EN 55014-2, EN 61000-3-2, and EN 61000-3-3 test results from a competent accredited laboratory are the usual voluntary standards route to presumption of conformity, but the legal obligation is the EMC Regulations. Existing Chinese EMC reports to GB 4343 standards do not automatically satisfy the UK pathway. The declaration and technical file should identify SI 2016/1091 and the standards or other specifications relied on.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立SI 2016/1091可接受的电磁兼容证据。由合格认可实验室出具的EN 55014-1、EN 55014-2、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3测试结果，是通常采用的自愿标准符合性推定路径，但法律义务是《电磁兼容法规》。现有按GB 4343标准出具的中国电磁兼容报告不会自动满足英国路径。符合性声明和技术文件应列明SI 2016/1091及所依据的标准或其他规范。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立SI 2016/1091可接受的電磁相容證據。由合格認可實驗室出具的EN 55014-1、EN 55014-2、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3測試結果，是通常採用的自願標準符合性推定路徑，但法律義務是《電磁相容法規》。現有按GB 4343標準出具的中國電磁相容報告不會自動滿足英國路徑。符合性聲明和技術文件應列明SI 2016/1091及所依據的標準或其他規範。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation under SI 2016/1091; EN 55014/EN 61000 standards are voluntary harmonised/designated-standard evidence for presumption of conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance under SI 2016/1091 is mandatory for heat pumps placed on the GB market. EN 55014 and EN 61000 testing is not mandatory law; it is the usual voluntary harmonised/designated-standard evidence route for presumption of conformity. Chinese GB 4343 EMC certification does not automatically satisfy the UK pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据SI 2016/1091，电磁兼容合规对投放大不列颠市场的热泵具有强制约束力。EN 55014和EN 61000测试并非强制性法律；它是通常采用的自愿协调/指定标准证据路径，可带来符合性推定。中国GB 4343电磁兼容认证不会自动满足英国路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據SI 2016/1091，電磁相容合規對投放大不列顛市場的熱泵具有強制約束力。EN 55014和EN 61000測試並非強制性法律；它是通常採用的自願協調/指定標準證據路徑，可帶來符合性推定。中國GB 4343電磁相容認證不會自動滿足英國路徑。

source.publisher: legislation.gov.uk / King's Printer of Acts of Parliament
